title: Privacy Policy
description: Learn how Pilot handles your data while you use our platform to book lessons and learn car driving.

sections.title: 1. Introduction
body: This Privacy Policy explains how Pilot collects, uses, and protects your information when you use our app or website to book and manage car driving lessons.
By creating an account or booking a lesson with Pilot, you agree to the practices described in this policy.

sections.title: 2. Information We Collect
body: Contact details such as your name, email address, and phone number when you sign up or contact support.
Profile and booking information such as preferred vehicle type, lesson history, and test preparation goals.
Payment-related details processed securely by our payment partners (we do not store full card numbers).
Technical data such as device type, app version, approximate location, and usage analytics to help us improve the learning experience.

sections.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
body: To create and manage your Pilot account and driving lesson bookings.
To match you with suitable instructors and keep a record of your learning progress.
To send lesson reminders, important updates, and service notifications.
To improve our curriculum, app performance, and safety features based on aggregated usage insights.

sections.title: 4. Sharing Your Information
body: We share relevant details with your assigned instructors so they can deliver your lessons effectively and safely.
We use third‑party providers for payments, analytics, and cloud hosting; they process data on our behalf under strict confidentiality obligations.
We may disclose information if required by law, regulation, or legal process, or to protect the rights, property, or safety of Pilot, our learners, or the public.
We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

sections.title: 5. Data Retention
body: We keep your account and booking records for as long as you have an active relationship with Pilot and for a reasonable period afterwards for legal and reporting purposes.
You may request deletion of your account, subject to any data we must retain to comply with legal obligations.

sections.title: 6. Your Rights
body: You can request access to the personal data we hold about you and ask us to correct inaccurate information.
Where applicable under local law, you may request deletion of your data or restrict certain types of processing.
You can opt out of non-essential marketing communications at any time using the unsubscribe link or your notification settings.

sections.title: 7. Security
body: We use industry-standard safeguards such as encryption in transit, access controls, and regular monitoring to protect your information.
No system is completely secure; we encourage you to use a strong, unique password and keep your login details confidential.

sections.title: 8. Children’s Privacy
body: Pilot is designed for adults and older learners who are legally eligible to hold a driving licence in their region.
If you believe a minor has provided us with personal information without appropriate consent, please contact us so we can review and delete it where necessary.

sections.title: 9. Changes to This Policy
body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we make material changes, we will highlight them in the app or on our website and update the effective date.

sections.title: 10. Contact
body: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or how your data is handled while you learn car driving with Pilot, please email us at help@withpilot.com.
